# AvökatFinder Albania
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Albania for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Albania
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Albania
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Albania legal terms
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Albania
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Albania
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

## Legal Glossary Terms
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/contract-formation/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/defamation/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/hipoteke-mortgage/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/hipoteke/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/inheritance-and-succession/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kadastra-cadastre/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kontrata-e-qirase-lease/
- https://albania.avokatfinder.com/glossary/regjistri-i-pasurive/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Albania
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://albania.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
